candidates.row_label: Total Revenue
candidates.why: Explicit top-line revenue label and matches Net Sales values exactly; suitable as the primary reported revenue line.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: Not revenue; cost component.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Cost of Revenue
candidates.why: Not revenue; cost component.

candidates.row_label: Cost of Revenues/COGS
candidates.why: Not revenue; cost line.

candidates.row_label: Costs for launch of online sales
candidates.why: Not revenue; operating cost.

candidates.row_label: Reported Comprehensive Income
candidates.why: Not revenue; bottom-line comprehensive income.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive income for the year attributable in its entirety to Parent Company shareholders
candidates.why: Not revenue; bottom-line comprehensive income.

candidates.row_label: Prepaid expenses and accrued income
candidates.why: Balance sheet asset, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Accrued Income - Short-Term
candidates.why: Balance sheet asset, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Accrued expenses and deferred income
candidates.why: Balance sheet liability, not revenue.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total revenue line from candidates.

candidates.row_label: Cost of goods and services sold
candidates.why: Direct cost-of-sales line directly under revenue; best match for COGS.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Cost of Revenue
candidates.why: Only a component of cost of revenue, not full COGS.

candidates.row_label: Cost of Revenues/COGS
candidates.why: Also a valid COGS label, but appears duplicative of the more specific cost-of-goods-and-services-sold line.

candidates.row_label: Cost of improvements on external properties , Gross
candidates.why: Balance sheet asset cost, not income-statement COGS.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: Only a component of cost of revenue.

candidates.row_label: Cost of goods and services sold - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing row; should be excluded.

candidates.row_label: Cost of improvements on external properties - accumulated depreciation
candidates.why: Balance sheet depreciation, not COGS.

candidates.row_label: Cost of improvements on external properties - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balance sheet balancing row, not COGS.

final_choice.row_label: Cost of goods and services sold

variables.notes: Preferred the direct reported cost-of-sales line over the duplicate-style 'Cost of Revenues/COGS' label.

candidates.row_label: Selling and administrative expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A row, populated, and should be selected alone per hierarchy.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: SG&A component, but should not be added when an explicit populated SG&A row exists because that would double count.

candidates.row_label: Other operating expenses
candidates.why: Possible overhead bucket, but explicit populated SG&A row exists, so this should not be added.

candidates.row_label: Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles - Gross
candidates.why: Balance sheet asset line, not SG&A.

candidates.row_label: Cost of improvements on external properties , Gross
candidates.why: Balance sheet asset line, not SG&A.

candidates.row_label: Employees - Full-Time/Full-Time Equivalents - Period End
candidates.why: Operational statistic, not expense row.

variables.notes: An explicit SG&A line exists and is populated, so selected only that row. Excluded components and other overhead rows to avoid double counting.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of intangible assets - capitalized IT-development integrated IT-platform
candidates.why: Not a dedicated R&D expense line and appears below operating profit in the supplemental section; not suitable for XRD.

variables.notes: No dedicated research and development expense line is present in the provided income statement.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses for external financing
candidates.why: Direct recurring interest expense on borrowings; core XINT component.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses for leases
candidates.why: Recurring financing cost related to leases; include as additional XINT component.

candidates.row_label: Other financial expenses
candidates.why: May include non-interest or non-recurring finance items; excluded to keep XINT focused on recurring interest.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Appears duplicative of 'Interest expenses for leases' supplemental disclosure; exclude to avoid double counting.

candidates.row_label: Non-current lease liabilities
candidates.why: Balance sheet liability, not expense.

candidates.row_label: Current lease liabilities
candidates.why: Balance sheet liability, not expense.

variables.notes: Used granular recurring interest expense rows and excluded broader/mixed or supplemental duplicate finance lines.

candidates.row_label: Net profit for the year attributable in its entirety to Parent Company shareholders
candidates.why: Income statement profit line, not book equity.

candidates.row_label: The result of the remeasurement of derivatives recognised in equity
candidates.why: OCI component, not total equity.

candidates.row_label: derivatives recognised in equity Result from hedge of net investments in
candidates.why: OCI component, not total equity.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive income for the year attributable in its entirety to Parent Company shareholders
candidates.why: Income statement comprehensive income, not equity balance.

candidates.row_label: Company shareholders
candidates.why: Not an equity balance sheet line.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to Parent Company shareholders
candidates.why: Owner/parent equity line that excludes non-controlling interests; best match for BE.

candidates.row_label: Total Equity
candidates.why: Valid fallback, but less preferred than parent-attributable equity because BE should exclude NCI.

candidates.row_label: Common Shareholders - Number
candidates.why: Shareholder count, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to Parent Company shareholders

variables.notes: Preferred parent-attributable equity to avoid any potential double counting with minority interest.
No minority interest / non-controlling interests row appears on the provided balance sheet; MIB mapped to empty list.
